✦ AI-Powered Resume Architecture

PrestigeCV uses advanced AI to generate bespoke, HR-optimised resume designs — tailored to your industry, role, and personal brand.

✦ The Collection

Five Iconic Designs

Each template is architecturally distinct — crafted to make an indelible impression on hiring managers and recruitment teams. Click any to apply it instantly.

AI Bespoke
Let AI Choose the Perfect Design
Our engine analyses your role & industry
to select the ideal template automatically

✦ The Advantage

Built for Impact

✦
Dynamic Experience Builder
Add unlimited work experiences with dedicated fields for job title, company, dates, and key achievements — all reflected live in the preview.
◈
Smart Design Selection
The AI engine reads your industry and seniority to recommend the most effective visual presentation strategy for your target employers.
⬡
ATS Optimised
Every template is engineered to pass Applicant Tracking Systems with clean semantic structure and keyword-rich formatting.
❋
Real-Time Preview
Watch your CV transform instantly as you fill in details. See every change before committing to download.
◉
PDF & Word Export
Download your finished CV as a pixel-perfect PDF for digital submission, or a fully editable Word document for further customisation.
⟡
5 Premium Templates
From ivory prestige to midnight carbon — each design crafted to make an indelible impression on HR teams and hiring agencies.

✦ The Process

Four Steps to Hired

01
Enter Your Details
Fill in personal info, add all your experiences, education, and skills using dedicated sections.
02
AI Selects Design
The engine analyses your industry and role type to recommend the most effective visual format.
03
Preview & Refine
Live preview updates as you type. Zoom in, switch templates, and perfect every detail before export.
04
Download & Apply
Export as PDF or editable Word document. Ready for immediate submission to any employer or agency.
